Package simulation

Class UAV

java.lang.Object
simulation.UAV
public final class UAV extends Object
The UAV (drone) entity in the discrete-event simulation.

    • replan

      public Route replan()
      Triggers replanning through all currently known, untokenised nodes.

      A convenience entry point for intelligences that want to delegate target selection entirely to the knowledge base. For intelligences that need to control which nodes to include (distance-filtered, coverage-filtered, etc.), use replan(List) directly.

      Returns:
      the new Route if at least 3 untokenised nodes are known, null otherwise

    • replan

      public Route replan(List<SensorNode> targets)
      Plans an optimised route through the given target nodes, orients it toward the UAV's current position, and activates it immediately.

      The caller is responsible for selecting and pre-filtering the targets list. Common patterns:

      • Filter to untokenised nodes only.
      • Sort by distance from the UAV and take the nearest N.
      • Exclude nodes in already-visited coverage sectors.
      Parameters:
      targets - pre-selected waypoints; requires ≥ 3 entries
      Returns:
      the new Route, or null if fewer than 3 targets are provided

    • activateRoute

      public void activateRoute(Route route)
